import React from 'react'; import { useWorkflow } from '../store/workflowContext'; export default function PreviewStep() { const { design, bookDetails } = useWorkflow(); const ty = design.typography || 'hybrid'; const layout = design.layout || 'standard'; const trim = (design.trim || '5.5x8.5').replace('x', '×'); const headingClass = ty === 'serif' ? 'font-serif' : 'font-sans'; const bodyClass = ty === 'serif' ? 'font-serif' : ty === 'sans' ? 'font-sans' : 'font-serif'; const subheadClass = ty === 'hybrid' ? 'font-sans text-slate-500' : `${headingClass} text-slate-500`; const layoutBodyClass = layout === 'spacious' ? 'text-[17px] leading-8' : layout === 'compact' ? 'text-[15px] leading-6' : 'text-base leading-7'; return (
{/* Left: book preview */}
Live Preview – {trim}" Format

{bookDetails.title || 'Chapter One'}

The Beginning

In the quiet town of Millbrook, where autumn leaves danced through cobblestone streets and the scent of fresh bread wafted from corner bakeries, something remarkable was about to unfold.

Margaret closed her weathered journal, its pages filled with decades of dreams and observations. Today marked the beginning of a new chapter—not just in her writing, but in her life.

“Every story begins with a single word,” she whispered to herself, pen hovering over a fresh page. “And every word carries the weight of possibility.”

{/* Right: selections summary */}

Your Design

  • Typography {ty}
  • Layout {layout}
  • Trim {trim}"
Tip: you can go back to Design to tweak any option.
); }
